---
title: "Talks — 2025"
---

The 2025 meeting ran at the Lodge, **15–20 June 2025**. Abstracts below.

## Keynote: What Mechanisms Leave Out {#keynote}

**Howard Tealeaf** — Australian National University

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Function Without Teleology: A Progress Report

**Sofia Marchetti** — University of Bologna

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Modularity Is in the Eye of the Modeller

**Wei Chen** — National University of Singapore

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## How Robust Is the Robustness Argument?

**Aroha Tipene** — University of Auckland

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Panel: Does Evo-Devo Need Its Own Philosophy?

Chaired by **Gregor Halvorsen**, with the day's speakers.

{{< lipsum 1 >}}
